svg.text: From Fluent Bit log shipper to real-time anomaly dashboard · Data transformations at each stage
● Elasticsearch write is async (fire-and-forget after anomaly detection returns)
● WebSocket broadcast happens after ES write — Frontend receives near-real-time (sub-second)
● Anomaly service unavailable → Backend logs error, skips scoring, writes unscored doc to ES
● Log parse failure → counted in parse_failure_count, excluded from reservoir, logged
LogGuard · log_controller.py · log_parser_service.py · anomaly_detection_service.py · elasticsearch_service.py · websocket_controller.py
